'''vadhoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oogamy|oogamy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oogamy|oogamy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vadhoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædheketh|vædheketh]] || [[word:vædhekej|vædhekej]] || [[word:vædhekesh|vædhekesh]] || [[word:vædheke|vædheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhodhokoth|vadhodhokoth]] || [[word:vadhodhokoj|vadhodhokoj]] || [[word:vadhodhokosh|vadhodhokosh]] || [[word:vadhodhoko|vadhodhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhokoth|vadhokoth]] || [[word:vadhokoj|vadhokoj]] || [[word:vadhokosh|vadhokosh]] || [[word:vadhoko|vadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhofkoth|vadhofkoth]] || [[word:vadhofkoj|vadhofkoj]] || [[word:vadhofkosh|vadhofkosh]] || [[word:vadhofkof|vadhofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadhokotho|vadhokotho]] || [[word:vadhokojo|vadhokojo]] || [[word:vadhokosho|vadhokosho]] || [[word:vadhokoko|vadhokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadhokoth|vadhokoth]] || [[word:vadhokoj|vadhokoj]] || [[word:vadhokosh|vadhokosh]] || [[word:vadhoko|vadhoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadhokothol|vadhokothol]] || [[word:vadhokojol|vadhokojol]] || [[word:vadhokoshol|vadhokoshol]] || [[word:vadhokokol|vadhokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadhokothotho|vadhokothotho]] || [[word:vadhokojojo|vadhokojojo]] || [[word:vadhokoshosho|vadhokoshosho]] || [[word:vadhokoko|vadhokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadhokothon|vadhokothon]] || [[word:vadhokojon|vadhokojon]] || [[word:vadhokoshon|vadhokoshon]] || [[word:vadhokokon|vadhokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadhokothoro|vadhokothoro]] || [[word:vadhokojoro|vadhokojoro]] || [[word:vadhokoshoro|vadhokoshoro]] || [[word:vadhokokoro|vadhokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
